status_legend.active: The one feature currently being worked.
status_legend.blocked: Progress is stopped by a documented blocker.
status_legend.passing: Verification passed and evidence is recorded.

features.title: Cross-platform harness CLI and Action
features.user_visible_behavior: Users can generate, audit, and safely update repo harness artifacts locally or through the GitHub Action.
verification: init creates missing harness artifacts without overwriting existing files by default
audit scores the practical harness domains and returns actionable recommendations
update applies only safe missing-file corrections unless forced
doctor checks Python and host platform compatibility
the root GitHub Action runs the same library code as the CLI

features.notes: Prior pushed CI passed. Current HarnessForge rename, platform-router, Codex SDLC controls, pins-ledger, script/boundary, cleanup, local release-prep, generated/local boundary, deep generated-surface workflow/Action boundary, generator release-prep, and reference-repo compatibility batches pass focused and full unit tests, POSIX and PowerShell entrypoints where run, compile, pin enforcement, metadata/JSON validation, generated-template mandate scans, rendered target smokes, drift smoke, sibling-repo compatibility smokes, stale-name and local-path scans, install smoke, isolated wheel smoke, diff hygiene, research refresh, self-audit, and target-platform audit checks. Remote macOS/Windows CI remains intentionally manual to control cost.
